UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user data including seating charts, credits, and subscription status.

charts.description: JSON stringified array of Chart objects.

credits.description: Number of remaining generation credits. Starts at 10.

isSubscribed.description: Whether the user has a paid subscription.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update.

/users/{email}.description: User document containing their profile and charts, keyed by email.
